REVERT: mem_frac=0.90 starves KV cache with mamba state

mem_frac=0.75: 879 tok/s (marginal over 0.80)

FAIL: --fp4-gemm-runner-backend not supported in SGLang 0.5.9

REVERT: 4 draft tokens = 256 decode (-71%). Draft count dominates decode speed.
2 reqs × 32 draft: 1387 tok/s decode! 100% accept. Batch limited by 2 reqs.
1 req × 64 draft: 1685 tok/s decode! 100% accept (64/64). NEW PEAK.
FAIL: 128 draft = garbage output (all !). DFlash block_size=16 max.
ALL NVFP4 RESULTS INVALID: Kbenkhaled compressed-tensors format produces garbage on SGLang 0.5.9. BF16 works. Need modelopt NVFP4 checkpoint.
BF16 9B SGLang baseline: 83 tok/s decode. Correct output confirmed.
BF16 9B + DFlash OOM: 17.6GB model + 3.2GB mamba state > 32GB. NVFP4 required.

PR #36847 ported to vLLM 0.17.0 + Qwen3.5 NVFP4. Fixed: aux_hidden_states, SupportsEagle3, M-RoPE positions, block_size. Model loads + CUDA graphs capture. CUDA assert on first inference — slot_mapping likely wrong for M-RoPE. Close but needs more work on DFlash slot_mapping for hybrid Qwen3.5.
vLLM NVFP4 + DFlash WORKING! 316.3 tok/s decode (2.59x vs vLLM baseline 122). Correct output verified on 3 prompts. CUDA graphs ON.
vLLM NVFP4 + DFlash eager: 8.1 tok/s correct output. CUDA graphs hang.
vLLM NVFP4 + DFlash + CUDA graphs WORKING! 94.6 tok/s, quality OK. All 8 patches applied. Reproducible.
DFlash draft=2: 117.8 tok/s (near baseline 125)
DFlash draft=4: 135.0 tok/s ABOVE BASELINE! (+8% vs 125)
DFlash draft=8: 87.2 (-30%). Overhead > benefit.
DFlash draft=16: 61.5 (-51%). Way too much overhead.
DFlash draft=3: 144.1 tok/s (+15% vs baseline)
DFlash draft=6: 162.3 tok/s (+30% vs baseline 125). NEW BEST! Quality OK.
DFlash draft=5: 114.2 (-9%)
DFlash draft=7: 105.9 (-15%)
DFlash draft=6 mem=0.80: 164.0 tok/s
DFlash draft=6 mem=0.90: 170.4 tok/s NEW BEST (+36% vs baseline)
DFlash draft=6 mem=0.92: 170.4 tok/s (same as 0.90)
Baseline (no DFlash) steady state: 124.8 tok/s (excluding first-run JIT)
CONFIRMED BEST: DFlash draft=6 mem=0.90: 170.0 tok/s steady (+36% vs baseline). Quality OK.
In-process mode: same speed (170.0). IPC not a bottleneck.
max_model_len=512: slower (138.6). CUDA graph alignment worse.
Baseline batch peak: 5817 tok/s at batch=96. Cliff at 128.
DFlash batch peak: 484 tok/s at batch=32. Plateaus. 12x slower than baseline at batch=96.
Auto KV batch peak: 5604 tok/s at batch=120. Cliff at 128. Close to earlier 6329.
FP8 e4m3 KV peak: 4474 at batch=96. FP8 e5m2 blocked with NVFP4. Underperforms auto KV.
FP8 e5m2 KV UNBLOCKED! decode=122, peak_batch=5674@bs96. Cliff still at bs128 - FP8 KV not expanding capacity as expected.
FP8 KV + gpu=0.92: OOM crash. Too aggressive.
FP8 KV + no prefix cache: peak 5868@bs120. +5% over auto KV. Cliff still at bs128.
DFlash draft=6 decode focus: 165.4 tok/s decode, 508 batch peak.
NEW BATCH PEAK! Mamba FP16 + FP8 KV: 7695@bs128 (surpasses earlier 7075). Cliff at bs256. Quality OK.
Fine sweep: 7515@bs128, 7272@bs120, 7228@bs112. Broad plateau 7000+ from bs96-224.
Decode: 170/191 tok/s (89% of BW ceiling, 105% of practical). NEAR PEAK. Batch: 7695/15131 (51% of practical). ROOM TO GROW.
Mamba FP16 + FP8 KV + no prefix: peak 7445@bs224. Broader plateau but lower peak than with prefix.
NEW BATCH PEAK! ctx=1024: 8245@bs128. Shorter context = more sequences = higher throughput.
ctx=1024 + no prefix: 7515@bs128. No prefix hurts here.
DFlash + Mamba FP16 + FP8 KV: failed (likely OOM from DFlash + FP8 KV + Mamba state)
ctx=512: 7801@bs128. Worse than ctx=1024.
ctx=768: 7939@bs128. Worse than ctx=1024.
gpu=0.91 + ctx=1024: 7368@bs96. Worse than gpu=0.90.
max_num_seqs=64: 5527@bs192. Too restrictive.
max_num_seqs=128: 6063@bs96. Worse than default 256.
max_num_seqs=256 (default): 7847@bs128. Best.
mamba-cache-mode=align: 8038@bs128. Cliff softened.
align + ctx2048 + no prefix: 8155@bs128. No hard cliff - 6155@bs256 still usable.
KEY: align mode sustains 6000-7700 tok/s from bs96 to bs512. No cliff! 6262@bs512 vs 1023 without.
vLLM server: 32 concurrent → 2973 output tok/s
vLLM server: 64 concurrent → 4574 output tok/s
vLLM server: 128 concurrent → 7981 peak output tok/s, 6862 sustained. Matches LLM API.
PRODUCTION CONFIG: ctx=64K + FP8 KV + Mamba FP16: decode=112, batch=7209@bs128. Only -13% vs ctx=1K. Quality OK.
vLLM tool calling VERIFIED: single call, parallel calls (2 cities), no-tool bypass, multi-step chain. All pass with --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser qwen3_xml
35B-A3B NVFP4: decode=11.2 tok/s, conc16=55 tok/s. Quality OK. Tool calling OK (parallel). gpu=0.93, ctx=4096, FP8 KV + Mamba FP16.
